content: We can frame Self-Refine as a single-perspective iterative refinement backbone that can be augmented with the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a hybrid self-improvement framework that retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no additional training or supervision. This hybrid framework would resolve Self-Refine's unaddressed blind spot of being stuck in local optima caused by consistent single-perspective feedback, while giving multi-perspective self-reflection a lightweight iterative structure that avoids extra computational overhead.
